name: TokenTracker

descFull: Track token usage across 25 AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Kiro, OpenCode, Antigravity, Copilot, Kimi, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, Grok, Kilo, Roo, Zed, Goose, Mimo, ZCode & more — local-first, zero-config, with a dashboard, macOS menu bar app, and desktop widgets.
